decision_or_outcome: Summary: The targeted fixes are correctly applied; the document is schema-aligned and free of the previous formatting artifact.

Minor suggestions: (1) In the Handoff Template, change '##Handoff' to '## Handoff' for proper heading formatting; (2) Add 'completed' to the Status line in the template to match the standard; (3) Consider an inline note in the checklist clarifying that next_owner lives under the 'handoff' object in JSON payloads to avoid ambiguity.
